title: Cal's Clear Hotbar
description: Changes the original Minecraft vanilla boring hotbar to a nice clear and modern look.
body:
# Cal's Clear Hotbar
Creates a simple and modern look compared to the original boring vanilla hotbar! 

**Latest Version : [1.21.4](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cals-clear-hotbar/version/qlILexwm)**
# 
![Banner for the resourcepack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/N2PiW4K8/images/f0c442067e57acc0dc96855851cc2812cbe36a9b.png)
#

**What is this resourcepack?**

Cal's Clear Hotbar removes the original vanilla hotbar to create a more sleek look for both your minecraft hotbar and game.

**Idea?**

While watching [MrCrayFish](https://www.youtube.com/@MrCrayfishMinecraft) on Youtube a few years back I liked his clear hotbar, a few laters and I wanted it again and couldn't find one so I made one myself. 

Made by [C4L - guns.lol](https://guns.lol/C4L)
